title: Northern Ontario energy credit (NOEC) calculation sheets - Canada.ca
content:
## Northern Ontario energy credit (NOEC) calculation sheets
- 2026 calculation sheets (applied for on the 2025 income tax and benefit return)
- 2025 calculation sheets (applied for on the 2024 income tax and benefit return)
- 2024 calculation sheets (applied for on the 2023 income tax and benefit return)
- 2023 calculation sheets (applied for on the 2022 income tax and benefit return)
